permits.description: Renovation of 2nd floor of the residence including new location for bathroom, adding closets and editing interior partition walls for bedrooms, New insulation, sheetrock, Trim, Paint.  Patch and refinish flooring,
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($244,330); keyword: renovation; minor: insulation

llm_assessment.reasoning: A significant $244,330 second-floor renovation involving layout changes and bathroom relocation by an owner-occupant represents a major update but lacks the kitchen renovation or non-owner occupancy indicators for high likelihood.
